name: Google Analytics
description: Google Analytics is a web analytics service offered by Google that tracks and reports website traffic.

name: Google Ads
description: Google Ads is an advertising service by Google for businesses that want to display ads on Google search results and its advertising network.

name: Meta Pixel
description: A piece of code that lets businesses measure, optimise and build audiences for advertising campaigns.

name: Hotjar
description: Hotjar is a product experience insights platform that gives you behavior analytics and feedback data to help you empathize with and understand your customers.

name: CookieHub
description: CookieHub is a Consent Management Platform (CMP) which allows users to control storage and processing of personal information.

name: YouTube
description: YouTube is a free video sharing website that makes it easy to watch online videos.

name: Cloudflare
description: Cloudflare is a global network designed to make everything you connect to the Internet secure, private, fast, and reliable.

name: Google reCaptcha
description: Google reCaptcha enables web hosts to distinguish between human and automated access to websites.

name: Vimeo
description: Vimeo, Inc. is an American video hosting, sharing, services provider, and broadcaster. Vimeo focuses on the delivery of high-definition video across a range of devices.

name: LinkedIn Insight
description: The LinkedIn Insight tag powers conversion tracking, website audiences, and website demographics within the LinkedIn system.

name: Microsoft Ads
description: Microsoft Advertising (formerly Bing Ads) is a service that provides pay per click advertising on the Bing, Yahoo!, and DuckDuckGo search engines.

name: Amazon Web Services
description: Amazon Web Services offers a broad set of global cloud-based products including compute, storage, databases, analytics, networking, mobile, developer tools, management tools, IoT, security, and enterprise applications.

name: Snowplow
description: Snowplow enables teams to collect rich, high-quality behavioral data across all digital platforms with dedicated data product and privacy tooling.

name: Stripe
description: Stripe is a payment processing platform that allows businesses to accept online payments, manage transactions, and handle recurring billing.

name: AddThis
description: AddThis is a social sharing tool that allows websites to easily integrate social media sharing buttons.

name: WooCommerce
description: WooCommerce is an open-source eCommerce platform for WordPress, allowing businesses to create and manage online stores.

name: HubSpot
description: HubSpot is a CRM platform that provides tools for marketing, sales, and customer service.

name: Windows Azure
description: Microsoft Azure is a cloud computing platform offering a wide range of services, including virtual machines, databases, and AI tools.

name: Microsoft Clarity
description: Clarity is a user behavior analytics tool that helps you understand how users interact with your website.

name: Matomo
description: Matomo is an open-source web analytics platform that provides detailed reports on website traffic, marketing campaigns, and user engagement.

name: Shopify
description: Shopify is an eCommerce platform that allows businesses to create, manage, and scale online stores.

name: Wordpress
description: WordPress is a widely-used content management system (CMS) that enables users to create and manage websites and blogs easily.

name: Microsoft ASP.Net
description: ASP.NET is an open source web framework, created by Microsoft, for building modern web apps and services.

name: Leadfeeder
description: Leadfeeder is a B2B visitor identification software that tracks and identifies companies that visit a website.

name: Google Maps
description: Google Maps is a web mapping platform offering satellite imagery, aerial photography, street maps, 360° interactive panoramic views of streets, real-time traffic conditions, and route planning.

name: Google Remarketing
description: Google Remarketing ads allow businesses to show targeted ads to the users who visited the website and didn't complete a conversion.

name: Squarespace
description: Squarespace is an all-in-one website building platform that allows users to create professional websites and online stores with customizable templates.

name: Adobe ColdFusion
description: Adobe ColdFusion is a web application development platform that enables rapid development of dynamic websites and applications.

vendor.name: Adobe Audience Manager, Adobe Experience Platform
Adobe Audience Manager, Adobe Experience Platform

name: Pinterest
description: Pinterest is a visual discovery platform where users can find, save, and share ideas through images and videos.

name: Pinterest
description: Pinterest is a visual discovery platform where users can find, save, and share ideas through images and videos.

name: Mailchimp
description: Mailchimp is a marketing automation and email marketing service used to manage mailing lists, send newsletters and campaigns, and track user interactions such as email opens, link clicks, and conversions.

name: WordPress Multilingual
description: WPML allows users to create multilingual websites, enabling content to be translated and displayed in multiple languages.

name: Yandex.Metrika
description: Yandex Metrica is a free web analytics service offered by Yandex that tracks and reports website traffic.

name: Twitter / X
description: Twitter is an online news and social networking site where people communicate in short messages called tweets.

name: TikTok Pixel
description: TikTok Pixel is an advertising and analytics tool that tracks how visitors interact with a website after viewing or clicking a TikTok ad. It enables conversion attribution, campaign measurement, retargeting, and audience creation for TikTok Ads. The data collected is used to optimize ad delivery and improve the effectiveness of marketing campaigns.

name: Google AdSense
description: Google Ads is an advertising service by Google for businesses that want to display ads on Google search results and its advertising network.

name: Klaviyo
description: Identifies visitors for linking on-site activity to Klaviyo marketing profiles and enabling personalized campaigns.

name: eviivo
description: Cloud-based booking and property management platform providing hosts and owners of independent hotels, B&Bs, vacation rentals, villas, urban rentals and property management companies with a simple way to manage guests, bookings and travel agencies through its powerful technology.

name: OpenTable
description: OpenTable is a real-time online reservation network for fine dining restaurants.

name: Baidu
description: Baidu pay per click advertising platform.

name: FullStory
description: FullStory provides digital experience analytics and session replay technology. It allows website owners to capture anonymized visitor interactions (such as clicks, scrolls, and navigation) for usability analysis, troubleshooting, and improving user experience.

name: Reddit
description: Reddit is a website with user-generated content and discussions of that content.

name: Olark
description: Olark is a chat tool that allows businesses to have in-person conversations with customers, prospects, and employees.

name: Mixpanel
description: Mixpanel is a powerful real-time analytics platform that helps companies measure and optimize user engagement.

name: PostHog Analytics
description: PostHog is a product analytics suite built for the modern enterprise, with the differentiators of being open source and having a broader view of the tools needed to make a product successful.

name: Insider
description: Platform for individualized, cross-channel customer experiences.

name: StackAdapt
description: Multi-channel programmatic advertising platform.

name: Intercom
description: Customer service solution that combines an AI chatbot, help desk, and proactive support.

name: Twitch
description: Twitch is an interactive livestreaming service for content spanning gaming, entertainment, sports, music, and more.

name: Echobox
description: Echobox is a tool for increasing social media presence and driving traffic websites.

name: TruConversion
description: TruConversion is an all-in-one analytics and feedback application that provides website and mobile visitor insights. It helps website owners understand the behaviour of visitors and assists in converting them into customers.

name: GA Connector
description: GA Connector integrates Google Analytics and Google Ads with Salesforce, Zoho, Pipedrive, or any other CRM.

name: Zoho PageSense
description: Zoho PageSense is a conversion rate optimization and A/B testing platform.

name: Zoho Campaigns
description: Zoho Campaigns is an Advanced Email Marketing product of Zoho.

name: Zoho Marketing Automation
description: Zoho Marketing Automation is a multichannel software solution with features designed to ease the marketing process and generate sales-ready leads.

name: Burst Statistics
description: Burst Statistics is a user-friendly web analytics tool for WordPress websites. It focuses on essential metrics while keeping user privacy in mind.

name: Nielsen Marketing Cloud
description: A leading provider of data technology powering the digital marketing ecosystem. Its customer data cloud provides the industry’s only unified customer profiles, which connect identities across all channels and devices — including display, video, audio, offline, mobile, and smart TVs — enabling marketers to engage individuals and households with personalized messages to drive performance at scale.

name: New Relic
description: New Relic is an observability platform used to monitor the performance of the website in real time. On the client side, it collects telemetry data such as page load times, JavaScript errors, and other performance metrics. This data helps identify technical issues and improve service reliability.

name: Apollo.io
description: Sales intelligence and engagement platform offering contact data, prospecting tools, and workflow automation.

name: Cookiebot
description: Consent management platform for collecting and storing user cookie preferences

name: Azure Application Insights
description: Performance monitoring and diagnostics service for web applications, helping developers detect, analyze, and resolve issues.

name: Contentsquare
description: Digital experience analytics platform providing session replay, heatmaps, and behavior insights to improve website usability.

name: hCaptcha
description: Bot-detection and anti-abuse service protecting websites from spam and automated attacks.

name: Optimizely
description: Digital experience platform offering A/B testing, experimentation, and personalization tools to optimize websites and apps.

name: PushOwl
description: Stores visitor ID, referrer, and prompt behavior to enable web push subscriptions, campaign attribution, and personalized messaging.

name: Global-e International Checkout & Localization Services
description: Global-e provides international e-commerce solutions that localize currency, shipping, pricing, and compliance for global customers—often integrated into Shopify, Magento, and other storefronts.

name: Forter Fraud Prevention
description: Forter is a real-time fraud detection and trust platform used by many e-commerce sites (including Shopify Plus merchants). It analyzes behavioral and technical data to determine whether transactions or visitors are legitimate.

name: AWS Elastic Load Balancing
description: AWS Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) automatically distributes incoming web traffic across multiple servers or services hosted on AWS.

name: Shop App
description: Mobile shopping app by Shopify that enables users to track orders, browse products, and make purchases from Shopify-powered stores.

name: BidTheatre DSP
description: BidTheatre is a demand-side platform (DSP) that enables advertisers and agencies to run programmatic advertising campaigns.

name: Sentry Session Replay
description: Sentry Session Replay is a feature that records and replays user interactions in the browser, such as clicks, navigation, and page state, to help developers troubleshoot issues and improve user experience. These recordings provide context for errors and performance problems while allowing sensitive data masking to maintain privacy compliance.

name: Glassbox
description: Glassbox is a digital experience analytics platform that records and analyzes user interactions on websites and applications. It helps businesses monitor performance, improve usability, and understand customer behavior while maintaining compliance with privacy regulations.

name: ZoomInfo
description: ZoomInfo is a B2B intelligence platform that provides data about companies and professionals. It helps organizations identify potential customers, enrich their contact databases, and analyze market opportunities.

name: Complianz
description: Complianz is a consent management platform (CMP) for WordPress and other websites. It provides cookie banners, consent storage, and region-specific compliance features to help site owners meet requirements under GDPR, CCPA, and similar privacy regulations.

name: Dotdigital
description: Dotdigital provides marketing automation, email campaigns, surveys, forms, landing pages, chat, and abandoned cart tools.

name: CleanTalk Anti-Spam & Security
description: CleanTalk provides cloud-based anti-spam and security services for websites and online forms. It helps block spam bots, detect suspicious activity, and protect login, comment, and registration forms without using captchas.

name: Bugsnag
description: Bugsnag is an error monitoring and crash reporting platform. It automatically detects, collects, and reports errors that occur in websites and applications. This helps developers diagnose technical issues, understand their impact on users, and improve overall stability and performance.

name: TrustArc
description: TrustArc Cookie Consent Manager is a consent management platform that helps websites comply with global privacy regulations such as GDPR, CCPA, and ePrivacy.

name: Fundraise Up
description: Donation platform that optimizes online giving experiences for nonprofits. It provides secure donation processing, fraud prevention, and personalized user interactions. The service uses cookies to ensure core functionality, remember user preferences, and collect usage statistics to improve performance.

name: ClickDimensions
description: Marketing automation platform built for Microsoft Dynamics 365. It provides tools for email marketing, lead capture, web analytics, campaign automation, and customer engagement tracking.

name: GoDaddy Domain Parking
description: Operated by GoDaddy to manage domain parking pages and display advertising on them. The service uses cookies to identify visitors, determine their location, and deliver relevant advertising.

name: Stape (server-side tagging)
description: A server-side Google Tag Manager (sGTM) hosting provider. Stape helps websites manage and deliver tracking scripts in a more privacy-friendly and efficient way by moving most tracking logic from the browser to secure servers.

name: Facebook Login
description: This service is provided by Meta Platforms, Inc. and allows users to sign in to websites and apps using their Facebook account. Facebook Login simplifies authentication by offering single sign-on (SSO) across platforms.

name: Proof Factor
description: This service provides on-site marketing tools such as social proof notifications, coupon boxes, and promotional popups. It uses cookies to track visitor sessions and page interactions in order to display targeted engagement campaigns, measure performance, and improve conversion rates.

name: Google Docs
description: Google Docs is part of the Google Workspace suite and provides cloud-based word processing, collaboration, and document editing. The service uses cookies to enable real-time editing, maintain user sessions, remember preferences, and ensure documents are saved and shared securely.

name: Gemius Audience Measurement
description: Gemius Audience Measurement is a web analytics and market research service operated by Gemius S.A. It provides publishers and advertisers with insights into website traffic, user behavior, and advertising effectiveness.

name: Post Affiliate Pro
description: Post Affiliate Pro is an affiliate tracking and management platform provided by Quality Unit, s.r.o. It is used by businesses to manage partnerships with affiliates and to track referrals, sales, and conversions.

name: Duda Smart Sites
description: Duda Smart Sites is a personalization feature provided by Duda, Inc. It uses cookies to measure visits, page views, and visitor details such as last visit time and time zone. This information allows websites built with Duda to adapt their content for new or returning visitors, show personalized messages, and improve the overall browsing experience.

name: TermsFeed Privacy Consent
description: TermsFeed provides a cookie consent management solution that allows websites to display a cookie banner and collect user preferences in line with privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA.

name: Poptin
description: Poptin provides website popups, forms, and bars designed to capture leads, grow email lists, and improve visitor engagement.

name: Zoho SalesIQ
description: Zoho SalesIQ is a live chat and visitor tracking service provided by Zoho Corporation.

name: OptiMonk
description: OptiMonk is a website personalization and conversion optimization platform that provides popups, on-site messages, and targeted campaigns.

name: LeadConnector
description: LeadConnector is a marketing, sales, and automation platform that provides funnels, websites, chat widgets, surveys, calendars, and e-commerce tools.

name: ConvertBox
description: ConvertBox is an on-site engagement and lead capture platform that allows websites to display personalized messages, popups, and forms based on visitor behavior.

name: Senja
description: Senja is a testimonial and social proof platform that helps businesses collect, manage, and display customer feedback across websites and marketing channels.

name: CookieFirst
description: Consent management platform for collecting and storing user cookie preferences

name: Snitcher
description: Snitcher (including its Radar service) is used to identify and analyze website visitors at a company level. The service enriches website traffic with business intelligence data, supports session analysis, and helps organizations understand how companies interact with their website for marketing, sales, and optimization purposes.

name: Claritas (formerly Barometric)
description: Advertising measurement and audience targeting

name: LiveIntent
description: Advertising platform used to enable targeted advertising and campaign measurement using first-party identifiers.
